Hero.title: Your Safety Is Our Priority
Hero.description: Secure private storage for correspondence, important documents, parcels and business deliveries, enhanced with Digital Mailroom services.

security.title: Maximum Security
security.description: Professionally managed private SafeBoxes designed to keep your correspondence, documents and valuables secure.

access.title: Private Access
access.description: Access your SafeBox whenever you need it with complete privacy and confidence.

collection.title: Simple Collection
collection.description: Collect correspondence, documents and small parcels quickly using your personal SafeBox key.

personal.title: Personal & Business Solutions
personal.description: Flexible solutions for individuals, professionals and businesses.

premium.title: Premium SafeBox Experience
premium.description: Elegant design, advanced security and professional service in one trusted location.

PrivateBoxes.title: Private Box Solutions
PrivateBoxes.description: A secure private space for documents, correspondence, small items and personal or business essentials.

privateRental.title: Private Box Rental
privateRental.text: Personal numbered boxes with secure access.

secureReceiving.title: Secure Receiving
secureReceiving.text: Receive documents and small items safely.

digitalServices.title: Digital Services
digitalServices.text: Optional scanning and secure digital delivery.

businessBoxes.title: Business Boxes
businessBoxes.text: Flexible private box solutions for companies.

SafeBoxSizes.title: Available SafeBox Sizes
SafeBoxSizes.description: Every membership includes a SafeBox. Select the storage size that best suits your needs, with larger sizes available as an upgrade where applicable.

xs.title: XS SafeBox
xs.description: Ideal for letters, everyday correspondence and important documents.

s.title: S SafeBox
s.description: Perfect for documents, small parcels and personal or professional storage.

m.title: M SafeBox
m.description: Provides additional capacity for larger parcels, business records and archive folders.

l.title: L SafeBox
l.description: Designed for large deliveries, equipment and archive storage.

xl.title: XL SafeBox
xl.description: Maximum storage capacity for oversized deliveries, commercial storage and bulk archives.

SafeBoxSizes.upgradeNote: You can upgrade to a larger SafeBox at any time as your storage requirements grow, subject to availability.

WhatYouCanStore.title: What Can You Store?
WhatYouCanStore.description: SafeBox gives you a secure private space for personal, professional and business items in a controlled location.

WhoIsFor.title: Who Is SafeBox For?
WhoIsFor.description: SafeBox is designed for anyone who values security, privacy and reliable access to their correspondence and stored items.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.description: A secure place for important correspondence, personal documents, keys and valuable everyday items.

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.description: Ideal for consultants, remote workers and professionals who need a reliable address and secure document handling.

businesses.title: Businesses
businesses.description: Professional management of business correspondence, deliveries, archives and authorised team access.

international.title: International Clients
international.description: Perfect for property owners, investors and clients who spend time outside Spain but need a trusted local presence.

HowItWorks.title: How SafeBox Works
HowItWorks.description: Getting started with SafeBox is quick and straightforward.

step1.title: Choose Your Membership
step1.description: Select the membership plan that best fits your needs. Every membership includes a SafeBox, with larger sizes available as an upgrade.

step2.title: Receive Securely
step2.description: Use your SafeBox for correspondence, documents and parcel deliveries, knowing everything is stored securely until you need it.

step3.title: Manage Your Mail
step3.description: Collect your items in person or use our optional scanning, forwarding and digital document services.

PricingPreview.title: Choose Your SafeBox Membership
PricingPreview.description: Designed for individuals, professionals and businesses, with flexible services and SafeBox sizes to suit different needs.

essential.description: Perfect for individuals who need a secure private box and reliable correspondence handling.

select.description: Ideal for professionals, remote workers and frequent travellers.

signature.description: Complete document management, digital services and priority handling.

executive.description: A complete business correspondence management solution.

ContactForm.title: Need Help Choosing the Right SafeBox?
ContactForm.description: Whether you're looking for a secure place for personal correspondence, business documents, parcels or long-term storage, our team will help you choose the ideal SafeBox size and membership.
ContactForm.selectedPlanMessage: Hello, I am interested in the SafeBox {plan} membership. Please contact me with more information.

advice.title: Personal Advice
advice.description: We'll recommend the most suitable SafeBox solution.

response.title: Fast Response
response.description: We aim to respond within one business day.

fields.name: Name
fields.membershipPlaceholder: Which membership are you interested in?
